title: Custom Orders
intro: Commission a cane made for you — from locally sourced wood, shaped by hand in Middle Georgia.

timeline.title: Submit request
timeline.description: Share how you will use the cane, preferred wood, height, and any details that matter.

timeline.title: Discuss details
timeline.description: We follow up to refine options, measurements, and finish.

timeline.title: Receive quote
timeline.description: You get a clear quote and timeline before anything begins.

timeline.title: Craft begins
timeline.description: The piece is shaped by hand in our workshop.

timeline.title: Payment
timeline.description: Deposit to start; balance before shipping.

timeline.title: Shipping
timeline.description: Carefully packed and sent to your door.

options: Wood species from local and specialty stock
Height and grip tailored to you
Inspired by a piece in the Collection, or fully original
